Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
//&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'VENDAS POR REGIME TRIBUTÁRIO' print Cabecalho End
&Periodo = 'PERIODO DE ' + trim(toformattedString(&iniPedDtaFat)) + ' À ' + trim(toformattedString(&FinPedDtaFat)) print Periodo print Titulo
padraoUsuario.Call('L', '#COMBORAMOWPVENDASREGIME#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &CollRatCod.FromJson(&PadObs)
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, LctTip, PedCliRatCod, PedCliCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCliRatCod in &CollRatCod when &CollRatCod.Count > 1 Where (PedDtaFic >= &iniPedDtaFat And PedDtaFic <= &finPedDtaFat) When &PedSts <> Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where (PedDtaFat >= &iniPedDtaFat And PedDtaFat <= &finPedDtaFat) When &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where (PedSts = &PedSts) or &PedSts.IsEmpty() and (PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)
Where LctCod = &LctCod when not &LctCod.IsEmpty() Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin when not &LctGerFin.IsEmpty() Where LctAtuSal = &LctAtuSal Where PedNovStsCod = &PedNovStsCod when not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty()
//Where PedCliRatCod = &RatCod When not &RatCod.IsEmpty()
if &RatCod <> PedCliRatCod if &RatCod <> 0 print printRamos
&CountSimples = 0 &CountPresumido = 0 &CountNormal = 0 &SimplesMoeda = 0 &PresumidoMoeda = 0 &NormalMoeda = 0 &CountSemClass = 0 &SemClassMoeda = 0 &countTotal = 0 &TotalMoeda = 0 Endif
&RatCod = PedCliRatCod do 'GetNomeRamoAtividade' Endif
Do Case Case PedCliPesReg = 'S' //SIMPLES if &PedCliCod <> PedCliCod &CountSimples += 1 &countTotal += 1 Endif &SimplesMoeda += PedVlrLiq
Case PedCliPesReg = 'P' //LUCRO PRESUMIDO if &PedCliCod <> PedCliCod &CountPresumido += 1 &countTotal += 1 Endif &PresumidoMoeda += PedVlrLiq
Case PedCliPesReg = 'N' //REGIME NORMAL if &PedCliCod <> PedCliCod &CountNormal += 1 &countTotal += 1 Endif &NormalMoeda += PedVlrLiq Otherwise if &PedCliCod <> PedCliCod &CountSemClass += 1 &countTotal += 1 Endif &SemClassMoeda += PedVlrLiq EndCase
&TotalMoeda += PedVlrLiq &PedCliCod = PedCliCod
&IsAchou = false For &SdtClientesRegimeItem in &SdtClientesRegime if &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod = PedCliCod &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot += PedVlrLiq &IsAchou = true Exit EndIf EndFor
if &IsAchou = false &SdtClientesRegimeItem = new() &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod = PedCliCod &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesRaz = PedCliRaz &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg = PedCliPesReg &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot = PedVlrLiq &SdtClientesRegime.Add(&SdtClientesRegimeItem) Endif
EndFor
if &RatCod <> 0 print printRamos EndIf
If &IsListarClientes = true //LISTAR CLIENTES
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true For &SdtClientesRegimeItem in &SdtClientesRegime If &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg = 'S' //SIMPLES if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &Periodo = 'REGIME SIMPLES NACIONAL' print TituloRegimeClientes &IsImprimeCabecalho = false Endif
&PedCliCod = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod &PedCliRaz = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesRaz &PedVlrLiq = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot Print ClienteRegime Endif EndFor
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true For &SdtClientesRegimeItem in &SdtClientesRegime If &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg = 'P'//LUCRO PRESUMIDO if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &Periodo = 'REGIME LUCRO PRESUMIDO' print TituloRegimeClientes &IsImprimeCabecalho = false Endif
&PedCliCod = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod &PedCliRaz = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesRaz &PedVlrLiq = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot Print ClienteRegime Endif EndFor
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true For &SdtClientesRegimeItem in &SdtClientesRegime If &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg = 'N'//REGIME NORMAL if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &Periodo = 'REGIME NORMAL' print TituloRegimeClientes &IsImprimeCabecalho = false Endif
&PedCliCod = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod &PedCliRaz = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesRaz &PedVlrLiq = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot Print ClienteRegime Endif EndFor
&IsImprimeCabecalho = true For &SdtClientesRegimeItem in &SdtClientesRegime If &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg <> 'N' and &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg <> 'P' and &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesReg <> 'S' if &IsImprimeCabecalho = true &Periodo = 'NAO CLASSIFICADOS' print TituloRegimeClientes &IsImprimeCabecalho = false Endif
&PedCliCod= &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesCod &PedCliRaz = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesRaz &PedVlrLiq = &SdtClientesRegimeItem.PesVlrTot Print ClienteRegime Endif EndFor Endif
sub 'GetNomeRamoAtividade' &RatNom = '' For Each Order EmpCod, RatCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where RatCod = &RatCod &RatNom = RatNom Exit EndFor EndSUb

parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&iniPedDtaFat, in:&FinPedDtaFat, in:&LctAtuSal, in:&PedSts, in:&PedNovStsCod, in:&LctGerFin, in:&LctCod, in:&IsListarClientes);
output_File(&Pgmname, 'PDF');
